final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [7:0] audio_in,
    output reg [3:0] audio_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        audio_out <= audio_in[7:4]; // take the most significant 4 bits
    end
endmodule
